zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara Hnerinn於1489年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格多福時，她的父親Hnerinn20歲，母親Hnerinn20歲。她於1514年與Hannsen Bauers在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格多福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1549年在德國薩辛福格特藍德可萊斯多福享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara Hnerinn was born in 1489, in Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, her father, Hnerinn, was 20 and her mother, Hnerinn, was 20. She married Hannsen Bauers in 1514, in Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1549, in Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara Hnerinn est née en 1489, à Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Hnerinn, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Hnerinn, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Hannsen Bauers en 1514, à Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1549, à Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans.

Sie hat 1514 in Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Hannsen Bauers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ko.Neundorf, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Saxo: 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 애나버그 니우도르프
ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Hnerinn(이)가 1489년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 니우도르프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hnerinn(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hnerinn(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1514년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 니우도르프에서 Hannsen Bauers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1549년 독일 작센 보크틀랜드크레이스 니우도르프에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Neundorf, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Saxo: неундорф, аннабирг, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara Hnerinn родилась в 1489 г. в местности неундорф, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Hnerinn было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Hnerinn, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hannsen Bauers в 1514 г. в местности неундорф, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1549 г. в местности неундорф, фогтландкрис, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 60 лет.
